[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Anjavay Rosit''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guard]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].

==Biography==
One week before the scheduled vote for the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]] and the establishment of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], Rosit was one of the Senate Guards assigned to disrupt a protest outside the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]]. When he attempted to extricate wounded protesters, he and fellow Guard [[Troye Mulleshar]] were clubbed by the crowd and received blunt-force trauma wounds.

==Appearances==
